节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Query whether the caller is default application based on type.
注释信息: @param { string } type - Application type or a file type that conforms to media type format.
@param { AsyncCallback<boolean> } callback - The callback of querying default application result.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2. Incorrect parameter types.

parameters.说明: Application type or a file type that conforms to media type format.
The callback of querying default application result.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2. Incorrect parameter types.
Capability not supported.

节点.功能描述: Query whether the caller is default application based on type.
注释信息: @param { string } type - Application type or a file type that conforms to media type format.
@returns { Promise<boolean> } Return true if caller is default application; return false otherwise.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2. Incorrect parameter types.

parameters.说明: Application type or a file type that conforms to media type format.

节点.return_description: Return true if caller is default application; return false otherwise.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2. Incorrect parameter types.
Capability not supported.

@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2. Incorrect parameter types.

节点.功能描述: Get default application based on type.
注释信息: @param { string } type - Application type or a file type that conforms to media type format.
@param { number } userId - Indicates the id for the user.
@param { AsyncCallback<BundleInfo> } callback - The callback of the BundleInfo object result.
@throws { BusinessError } 202 - Permission denied, non-system app called system api.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2. Incorrect parameter types.
@throws { BusinessError } 17700004 - The specified user ID is not found.
@throws { BusinessError } 17700023 - The specified default app does not exist.
@throws { BusinessError } 17700025 - The specified type is invalid.

parameters.说明: Application type or a file type that conforms to media type format.
Indicates the id for the user.
The callback of the BundleInfo object result.

error_codes.description: Permission denied.
Permission denied, non-system app called system api.
Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2. Incorrect parameter types.

The specified user ID is not found.
The specified default app does not exist.
The specified type is invalid.

节点.功能描述: Set default application based on type.
注释信息: @param { string } type - Application type or a file type that conforms to media type format.
@param { ElementName } elementName - Uniquely identifies an ability or extensionAbility.
@param { number } userId - Indicates the id for the user.
@param { AsyncCallback<void> } callback - The callback of setting default application result.
@throws { BusinessError } 202 - Permission denied, non-system app called system api.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2. Incorrect parameter types.
@throws { BusinessError } 17700004 - The specified user ID is not found.
@throws { BusinessError } 17700025 - The specified type is invalid.
@throws { BusinessError } 17700028 - The specified ability does not match the type.

parameters.说明: Application type or a file type that conforms to media type format.
Uniquely identifies an ability or extensionAbility.
Indicates the id for the user.
The callback of setting default application result.
